habitat: Damp deciduous woods of Central Europe; spring ephemeral.
habitatDe: Damp deciduous woods von Mitteleuropa; Frühling ephemeral.
traditionalUsesEn: Culinary wild garlic; traditional spring blood-cleansing and digestive folk use.
traditionalUsesDe: Kulinarisch wild garlic; traditionell Frühling Blut-cleansing und verdauungsfördernd folk Verwendung.
preparation: Fresh leaves in pesto, soups; short infusions.
preparationDe: Frisch Blätter in pesto, soups; kurz Aufgüsse.
cautions: Do not confuse with toxic look-alikes (lily of the valley, autumn crocus).
cautionsDe: Nicht confuse mit toxic look-alikes (lily von valley, Herbst crocus).
historicalNotes: Alpine and Central European spring forage classic.
historicalNotesDe: alpin und mitteleuropäisch Frühling forage classic.
